annotation_target.structure: Recapitulation consequent — warm F major close, dreaming complete
teaching_goals: the final resolution is the most peaceful of all
complete the dream — let the F major ring
style_tips: p to pp — the end approaches gently
no ritardando unless marked — Satie's endings are simple

teaching_notes.note: The dream ends quietly. Let the F major resolution settle completely.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 21–24 of Traumerei (Dreaming) from Kinderszenen (continuation of mm. 17–20), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 21–24 and describe how this recapitulation section closes.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 21–24.
Measures 21–24 complete the recapitulation period with a peaceful consequent. The phrase settles warmly into F major. The dreaming is complete. Let me loop mm. 21–24.
Schumann Traumerei mm. 21–24: recapitulation consequent, warm F major resolution. Pairs with mm. 17–20.
